Camera: A physical or logical camera device used for video surveillance and analytics.
Camera.capacity_group_token: Token identifying the capacity group this camera belongs to.
Camera.created_at: Timestamp when the camera was created.
Camera.edge: Boolean indicating if the camera is an edge device.
Camera.is_dvr: Boolean indicating if the camera is a DVR.
Camera.name: Human-readable name of the camera.
Camera.snapshot_url: URL to the latest snapshot image of the camera.
Camera.state: Current operational state of the camera (e.g., active, inactive).
Camera.updated_at: Timestamp when the camera was last updated.
Camera.video_modules: List of active video analytics module codes.
CameraSource: The connection details and stream URL for a camera.
CameraSource.host: IP address or hostname of the camera.
CameraSource.url: Full RTSP URL for the video stream.
DetectionLine: A virtual line in the video frame for crossing detection.
DetectionLine.name: Name of the line.
DetectionLine.obj_classes: List of object classes monitored by this line.
OnvifConfig: ONVIF protocol configuration for camera control.
Place: A physical location where a camera is installed.
Place.description: Detailed description or address of the place.
Place.group_id: ID of the group this place belongs to.
Place.name: Name of the place.
RegionOfInterest: A defined area within the video frame for analytics events.
RegionOfInterest.name: Name of the ROI.
RegionOfInterest.situation_id: ID of the situation associated with this ROI.
RegionOfInterest.watch_people_activity: Whether to watch for people activity.
Tag: A tag associated with a camera for categorization.
Tag.name: Name of the tag.
VideoAnalyticsModule: A specific analytics module (e.g., FaceRecognitionModule, SituationAnalyticsModule) configured on a camera.
VideoAnalyticsModule.name: Name of the analytics module, only: `FaceRecognitionModule` or `SituationAnalyticsModule`.
VideoStreamingConfig.storage_depth: Number of days to store video.
